scripts.build: npm run build --workspace apps/mobile-web && dotnet build VolturaAir.slnx && npm run verify:host-web
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace apps/mobile-web -- --run && dotnet test VolturaAir.slnx
scripts.verify:host-web: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const p='apps/windows-host/bin/Debug/net10.0-windows/wwwroot/index.html'; if (!fs.existsSync(p)) { console.error('Missing '+p); process.exit(1); }"
